languages.text: Несколько вырванных из дневника страниц покрыты торопливыми строками на Низком Готике.
A few pages torn from the diary are covered in hurried lines in Low Gothic.
languages.original_text: Несколько вырванных из дневника страниц покрыты торопливыми строками на Низком Готике.

traits.locale_text: A few pages torn from the diary are covered in hurried lines in Low Gothic.
A few pages torn from the diary are covered in hurried lines in Low Gothic.
A few pages torn from the diary are covered in hurried lines in Low Gothic.

languages.text: 从日记中撕下的几页纸，上面满是匆忙写就的低哥特语。
languages.original_text: A few pages torn from the diary are covered in hurried lines in Low Gothic.

traits.locale_text: 从日记中撕下的几页纸，上面满是匆忙写就的低哥特语。

languages.text: Unas pocas páginas arrancadas del diario están escritas en presuroso Bajo Gótico.
languages.original_text: A few pages torn from the diary are covered in hurried lines in Low Gothic.

traits.locale_text: Unas pocas páginas arrancadas del diario están escritas en presuroso Bajo Gótico.

languages.text: Quelques pages ont été arrachées au journal, couvertes d'une écriture pressée en bas gothique.
languages.original_text: A few pages torn from the diary are covered in hurried lines in Low Gothic.

traits.locale_text: Quelques pages ont été arrachées au journal, couvertes d'une écriture pressée en bas gothique.

languages.text: Günlükten yırtılmış birkaç sayfa, Adi Gotik dilinde aceleyle yazılmış satırlarla kaplı.
languages.original_text: A few pages torn from the diary are covered in hurried lines in Low Gothic.

traits.locale_text: Günlükten yırtılmış birkaç sayfa, Adi Gotik dilinde aceleyle yazılmış satırlarla kaplı.

languages.text: Einige aus dem Tagebuch herausgerissene Seiten wurden hastig auf Niedergotisch beschrieben.
languages.original_text: A few pages torn from the diary are covered in hurried lines in Low Gothic.

traits.locale_text: Einige aus dem Tagebuch herausgerissene Seiten wurden hastig auf Niedergotisch beschrieben.

languages.text: 日記のページが数枚、急いで書かれたロー・ゴシックの文字で覆われている。
languages.original_text: A few pages torn from the diary are covered in hurried lines in Low Gothic.

traits.locale_text: 日記のページが数枚、急いで書かれたロー・ゴシックの文字で覆われている。
